# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Clarify which repo-relative atm10 docs are authoritative for one local workflow because overview docs and canonical guides are drifting apart.
## Expected selection
use
## Why
The base `aoa-source-of-truth-check` workflow is already correct, and the remaining work is a thin local map of repo-relative authoritative docs and review posture.
## Expected object
A local source-of-truth map that names the authoritative repo-relative file and the matching review posture.
## Boundary notes
Use this overlay when the ambiguity is local to one repo family and does not require a broader policy framework.
## Verification hooks
The response should name the authoritative file, the local review posture, and why the local docs surface is easier to navigate.
